title: Blockchain-Based Continuous Internal Evaluation Process
description: A flowchart illustrating how blockchain technology securely manages and records the continuous internal evaluation process, from creation and assessment to immutable storage and verification.
relationships: Instructor creates and submits evaluation data -> Data is hashed and sent to a smart contract -> Smart contract executes predefined evaluation rules -> Validated results are grouped into a new block -> New block is cryptographically linked to the chain -> Authorized verifiers can access and audit the immutable record
